race.comment: BADGER BOB (2) is on debut today but has shown promising signs at the trials across two campaigns. Pike was on board for his latest trial where he won and this looks a favourable set-up for him today. Finds a winnable race on debut and can make an impact straight away. GREYT RUBY (7) missed in a photo finish first-up at York before a 3.6L at Belmont last time out. This looks to suit her much better and a better draw this time around can see her back to her best. Form out of her last start has been good and she can make her presence felt. BUBBLES IN RIO (4) comes into this without a trial, but she ended last campaign in good order and can return in similar fashion. Should be prominent from the inside draw and will give them something to catch. INSOFARAS (12) won't be far away on debut. ACQUIRED TASTE (8) can make an impression on her return to racing.
